---
description: Accessibility rules for any user-facing UI
applyTo: "**/*.{astro,html,svelte,vue,jsx,tsx,css,scss}"
---

<!-- @format -->

# A11y Rules

[WCAG 2.2 AA](https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG22/) is the target. Audits use [Accessibility Ally](../agents/accessibility-ally.agent.md).

## Non-negotiables

- Prefer native HTML; use ARIA only when no native element fits.
- Every interactive element is keyboard operable with a visible `:focus-visible` indicator.

## Structure

- One `<h1>` per page, inside `<main>`. No skipped heading levels.
- Landmarks: `<header>`, `<main id="main-content">`, optional `<footer>`.
- First focusable element is a skip link targeting `#main-content`.
- `<html lang>` set. `<title>` includes the page subject.

## Keyboard & focus

- Tab order matches reading order. No `tabindex > 0`.
- Composite widgets follow WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices; widget root is the single tab stop where appropriate.
- No focusable elements inside `aria-hidden="true"`.

## Color & contrast

- Text 4.5:1 (3:1 for large text ≥24px regular / 18.66px bold).
- Focus and affordance borders 3:1 vs adjacent colors.
- Never convey meaning by color alone.
- Design tokens only — no ad-hoc hex.

## Forced colors

- No `forced-color-adjust: none` without justification.
- SVGs use `currentColor`.
- `box-shadow` focus styles also set a transparent `outline`.

## Reflow & images

- Page reflows to 320px width with no horizontal scrolling.
- Media scales (`max-width: 100%; height: auto;`).
- Informative `<img>` has descriptive `alt`; decorative uses `alt=""`.
- Set intrinsic `width`/`height` on `<img>`.
- Theme-variant images share alt text.

## Links & buttons

- Link text meaningful out of context — no "click here" / "read more" / bare URLs.
- External links: `target="_blank"` + `rel="noopener noreferrer"` + a visible out-of-context indicator (icon plus accessible label or `sr-only` text).
- Icon-only buttons have `aria-label` matching visible meaning.
- Toggles expose `aria-pressed`.

## Motion & status

- Respect `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`. Nothing autoplays.
- `role="status"` for polite, `role="alert"` for errors.

## Pre-merge check

- One `<h1>`; heading order intact.
- Tab order and focus visibility verified.
- Composite widgets keyboard- and pointer-operable; `aria-hidden` tracks active item.
- 320px reflow has no horizontal scroll.
- Build passes with 0 errors / 0 warnings.
